sqlMap.select: SELECT (Brd_Level + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(Brd_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_BRD ( BRD_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, BRD_NM, RESLOCATION, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_COMPANY, BRD_ID, BRD_GB, BRD_LEVEL, BRD_STEP, MAKEDATE, ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_GROUP, BRD_URL, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_COUNT, BRD_REF, BRD_NM2, TENANT_ID, OWNERNM2 ) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, #v_P_ODeptID#, #v_P_ODeptNm#, #v_P_OwnerID#, #v_P_OwnerNm#, #v_P_OwnerPos#, #v_P_OwnerCall#, #v_P_Brd_NM#, #v_P_ResLocation#, #v_P_Brd_Explain#, #v_P_CompanyID#, #v_Brd_ID#, '1', #v_Brd_Level#, #v_Brd_Step#, DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(),'%Y%m%d'), 20, 'A00', '', #v_P_AccessNoty#, 365, 0, 0, #v_P_Brd_NM2#, #tenantID#, #v_P_OwnerNm2# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET OWNDEPTID = #v_P_ODeptID#, OWNDEPTNM = #v_P_ODeptNm#, OWNERID = #v_P_OwnerID#, OWNERNM = #v_P_OwnerNm#, OWNERPOSITION = #v_P_OwnerPos#, OWNERCALL = #v_P_OwnerCall#, BRD_NM = #v_P_Brd_NM#, BRD_ACCESS = #v_P_AccessNoty#, BRD_EXPLAIN = #v_P_Brd_Explain#, BRD_NM2 = #v_P_Brd_NM2# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_RESACL SET DEPT_YN = #v_P_Dept_YN#, SDA_YN = #v_P_SDA_YN#, MEMBER_NAM = #v_P_Member_nam#, MEMBER_NAM2 = #v_P_Member_nam2#, ACCESS_LVL = #v_P_Access_lvl# WHERE RESID = #v_P_ResID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_P_Member_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_P_RESID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_STEP FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_SourceID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_STEP FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_TargetID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_NM = #v_DISPLAYNAME#, BRD_NM2 = #v_DISPLAYNAME2# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_BOARD_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_STEP = #v_SourceStep# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_SourceID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_STEP = #v_TargetStep# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_TargetID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_REF FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_LEVEL + 1 FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(BRD_STEP) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_REF = #v_TargetRef#, BRD_LEVEL = #v_TargetLevel#, BRD_STEP = #v_TargetStep#, BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_SourceID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_LEVEL = #v_P_TargetLevel# WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_STEP = BRD_STEP - 1 WHERE BRD_UPPER = ( SELECT S1.BRD_UPPER FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S1 ) AND BRD_STEP > ( SELECT S2.BRD_STEP FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S2 ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND BRD_ID IN ( SELECT RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE CompanyID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID IN ( #v_P_DeptPath# ) AND BRD_ID IN ( SELECT BRD_ID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION SELECT RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_P_UserID# AND BRD_ID IN ( SELECT BRD_ID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step
SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_STEP

SELECT DEPT_YN , SDA_YN , MEMBER_NAM , MEMBER_NAM2 , MEMBER_ID , ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY FIELD(MEMBER_ID, 'everyone') DESC, ACCESS_LVL ASC, MEMBER_NAM ASC
SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #resID# AND Brd_Company = #companyID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #resID# AND Brd_Company = #companyID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NUM , PNUM , A.OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG APPROVEFLAG , A.RETURNFLAG RETURNFLAG , B.APPROVEFLAG USEAPPROVE , B.RETURNFLAG USERETURN , STR_TO_DATE(#v_PNOWDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') NOWDATE , U.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , U.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , A.COMPANYID COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_BRD B ON A.OWNERID = B.BRD_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.WRITERID = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.REFLAG = '0' AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE
AND A.APPROVEFLAG = '1'
AND A.APPROVEFLAG = '0'
AND ENDDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PNOWDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T')
AND ENDDATE > STR_TO_DATE(#v_PNOWDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T')
AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.NUM , PNUM , A.OWNERID , A.TITLE TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG APPROVEFLAG , A.RETURNFLAG RETURNFLAG , B.APPROVEFLAG USEAPPROVE , B.RETURNFLAG USERETURN , STR_TO_DATE(#v_PNOWDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') NOWDATE , U.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , U.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , A.COMPANYID COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_BRD B ON A.OWNERID = B.BRD_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.WRITERID = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition C ON A.ownerID = C.ownerID AND A.num = C.num AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND A.REFLAG = '1' AND (STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATETIME OR STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') >= ENDDATETIME ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND A.APPROVEFLAG = '1'
AND A.APPROVEFLAG = '0'
ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC
